data.title: Metaplanet Faces Major Financial Test Amid Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Metaplanet's Asian division is undergoing a significant financial challenge as it holds 40,177 bitcoins, acquired at a total cost of approximately $4.18 billion. The company is currently facing an unrealized loss of around $490 million. Additionally, its stock price has retreated more than 83.5% from its historical peak, and its market capitalization stands at about $2.8 billion, which is now less than the value of its bitcoin holdings. The question remains whether Metaplanet can withstand this financial pressure.

data.title: US media: Trump will be briefed on new action plans against Iran on Thursday, including a strong strike and partial control of the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: Two sources familiar with the matter said that Trump plans to be briefed on Thursday by U.S. Central Command Commander Brad Cooper on new plans for potential military action against Iran. This briefing indicates that Trump is seriously considering resuming large-scale military operations to break the deadlock in negotiations or deliver a decisive blow before ending the war. Three sources said that Central Command has prepared a plan for a “short but powerful” strike against Iran, potentially including targets on infrastructure. The expectation is that Iran will subsequently show greater flexibility on its nuclear program and return to the negotiating table. Another option expected to be presented to Trump is controlling portions of the Strait of Hormuz to restore commercial shipping. One source said such an operation could involve ground troops. Another option, previously discussed and likely to be presented in the briefing, is conducting special forces operations to secure control of Iran’s highly enriched uranium stockpile. Cooper briefed Trump similarly on February 26, two days after the U.S. and Israel launched their war against Iran. A person close to Trump said that briefing was what prompted Trump’s decision to go to war. (Jinshi)

data.title: April Stock Rally in India Faces Skepticism Amid Rupee Decline
data.description: The April rally in Indian stocks is facing skepticism as investors question its sustainability. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns over the lack of conviction in the market's upward movement. Meanwhile, the Indian rupee has hit another record low, adding to the economic challenges. Analysts suggest that the stock market's performance may be influenced by global economic factors and domestic policy decisions. The rupee's decline is attributed to various pressures, including inflation and geopolitical tensions. Investors are advised to remain cautious as the market navigates these uncertainties.

data.title: International oil prices rose, with Brent crude increasing by 2%.
data.description: According to Gate data, Brent crude futures rose 2% to $112.672 per barrel, while WTI crude futures rose nearly 2% to $109.64 per barrel, the highest level since April 7.

data.title: Whale Trader Opens 80,000 ETH Long Position Worth $182 Million on Hyperliquid
data.description: An anonymous whale trader has initiated a substantial long position of 80,000 ETH, valued at $182 million, on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, on-chain analyst ai_9684xtpa revealed that this trader has accumulated a total long position of 120,000 ETH over the past two months, resulting in a trading profit of $44.61 million.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Review New Military Plans Against Iran
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump is set to receive a briefing from U.S. Central Command Commander Brad Cooper on Thursday regarding new plans for potential military action against Iran, according to Jin10. The briefing indicates Trump's serious consideration of resuming large-scale military operations to break the negotiation deadlock or deliver a decisive blow before ending the conflict. Three informed sources revealed that the Central Command has prepared a plan for a 'swift and powerful' strike against Iran, potentially targeting infrastructure. The expectation is that Iran will then show greater flexibility on nuclear issues and return to the negotiating table.

Another plan expected to be presented to Trump involves controlling parts of the Strait of Hormuz to restore commercial shipping access. A source mentioned that such actions might include ground forces. Additionally, a previously discussed option that may be raised in the briefing is conducting special forces operations to secure Iran's high-enriched uranium reserves. Cooper had previously briefed Trump on February 26, and two days later, the U.S. and Israel launched a war against Iran. A person close to Trump stated that it was that briefing that led to Trump's decision to go to war.

data.title: The crypto market saw mixed results, with the meme sector rising nearly 4% while BTC fell to $76,000.
data.description: On April 30th, according to SoSoValue data, the cryptocurrency market saw mixed performance, with the Meme sector performing relatively well, rising 3.89% in the last 24 hours. Specifically, Dogecoin (DOGE) rose 7.40%, BUILDon (B) rose 9.16%, and SPX6900 (SPX) and Siren (SIREN) rose 3.87% and 4.84% respectively. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.30% to $77,000, and Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.87%, remaining above $2,200. Other notable sectors included: AI, which rose 1.11% in the last 24 hours, with SkyAI (SKYAI) surging 27.53%; and Layer 2, which rose 0.19%, with Arbitrum (ARB) rising 2.97%. In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 0.12%, but Trust Wallet (TWT) rose 0.95%; the Layer 1 sector fell 0.39%, while Aptos (APT) surged 4.75% intraday; the CeFi sector fell 0.55%, with Bitget Token (BGB) remaining relatively strong, rising 1.08%; and the DeFi sector fell 1.06%, while Terra Luna Classic (LUNC) bucked the trend, rising 8.83%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical performance show that the ssiMeme, ssiMAG7, and ssiSocialFi indices rose 3.28%, 0.81%, and 0.59%, respectively.

data.title: Cambricon's stock price hit a new high, with its market capitalization exceeding 670 billion yuan.
data.description: Cambricon's stock price surged nearly 13% intraday, breaking through 1595.88 yuan per share, a new all-time high, and its market capitalization exceeded 670 billion yuan. Previously, Cambricon's stock price surpassed that of Yuanjie Technology, making it the new A-share market's top-performing stock. (Jinshi)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Zhou Dasheng Discusses Gold Price Impact on Jewelry Industry
data.description: On April 30, Jin10 reported that Zhou Dasheng highlighted the significant impact of gold prices on the operations of the gold jewelry industry during a conference call on April 29. According to Jin10, the marginal impact of continued gold price increases in 2026 is expected to diminish for the industry. Following the implementation of the gold tax reform policy in November 2025, the market adapted faster than anticipated, with retail prices adjusting to include the tax. Data from self-operated stores indicate that sales have continued to rise, suggesting that the effects of the tax reform will gradually be absorbed by the market.

data.title: Ant Group's zkDTVM Sets New Record in Ethereum Benchmark Test
data.description:
Ant Group's self-developed zero-knowledge proof virtual machine, zkDTVM, has recently achieved a significant milestone in the global benchmark test EthProofs initiated by Ethereum. According to Foresight News, zkDTVM reduced block proof speed to 3.7 seconds under standardized hardware and testing rules, surpassing the previous industry record of 4.2 seconds, and becoming the fastest globally. Unlike single laboratory tests, EthProofs requires participants to compare under real load and reproducible processes. Ant Group utilized a zkVM architecture designed for GPU-native parallel features, restructuring from the execution layer to the proof system layer.

In blockchain layered architecture, zero-knowledge proof virtual machines (zkVM) play a crucial role in packaging and verifying blockchain transactions, with proof speed directly affecting system throughput limits. The industry has long aimed for "real-time proof" as a goal for high-throughput verification, but engineering implementation has faced persistent challenges. This technological advancement also supports new capabilities for trusted collaboration among intelligent agents.

Ant Group has developed a comprehensive technical system supported by multiple top academic conference papers in the fields of underlying cryptography and system engineering. This system covers the complete chain from hardware acceleration, security modeling, protocol proof to system implementation. Over the past three years, technological achievements in this field have been published in leading conferences such as DAC 2024, Asiacrypt 2024-2025, and PKC 2026.

data.title: FalconX-Linked Address Makes Significant USDC Deposit and Leverages CL Long Position
data.description: A FalconX-associated address has deposited $11.94 million USDC into HyperLiquid, significantly increasing its 20x leveraged CL long position to approximately $21.6 million. According to NS3.AI, the address also maintains smaller leveraged positions, including a 20x long in BRENTOIL and 10x short positions in HIMS and RIVN.

data.title: Upbit will launch MEGA Korean Won pair
data.description: According to an official announcement, Upbit will launch MEGA Korean Won pairs.

data.title: Tron Verifies $9.4 Million in USDT for Crypto Real Estate Purchases
data.description: Tron has confirmed the verification of approximately $9.4 million in USDT on-chain funds, according to NS3.AI. This was achieved through a collaborative effort with RealOpen, aimed at facilitating cryptocurrency transactions in the real estate sector. Tron stated that its network played a crucial role by offering the necessary payment infrastructure, which includes on-chain fund verification and seamless crypto-to-fiat conversion processes.

data.title: Ant Financial ranked first in the global Ethereum benchmark EthProofs.
data.description: Recently, in EthProofs, a global benchmark initiated by Ethereum, Ant Financial's self-developed zero-knowledge proof virtual machine zkDTVM, under unified hardware and testing rules, compressed the block proof speed to 3.7 seconds, breaking the previous industry record of 4.2 seconds and taking the top spot globally. EthProofs is one of the most widely recognized public benchmarks in the industry. Unlike single laboratory tests, this platform requires participants to compare under real loads and reproducible processes. Ant Financial's breakthrough is built on end-to-end systemic optimization—adopting the zkVM architecture tailored to the native parallelism of GPUs, and collaboratively reconstructing from the execution layer, arithmetic layer to the proof system layer.

data.title: U.S. Midwest Storms Impact Soybean Futures, Market Optimistic on Export Outlook
data.description: CBOT soybean futures have reached their highest level in over six weeks, driven by adverse weather conditions in the U.S. Midwest that may disrupt early planting activities. According to Jin10, the market is optimistic about the export prospects for U.S. soybean meal, contributing to the upward trend in futures prices.

data.title: Philippine Central Bank to Monitor Inflation and Economic Growth
data.description: The Philippine Central Bank has indicated that the inflation rate for April 2026 is expected to remain between 5.6% and 6.4%. According to Jin10, the bank plans to stay vigilant and will use upcoming data as guidance, with a particular focus on inflation and economic growth prospects.

data.title: FalconX-related whales held a long position with 20x leverage, totaling approximately $21.6 million (CL).
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address associated with FalconX deposited $11.94 million USDC into HyperLiquid and increased its long position in CL (20x leverage) to 202,000 Coins, with a position value of approximately $21.6 million. In addition, this address also holds a small long position in BRENTOIL (20x leverage) and short positions in HIMS and RIVN (10x leverage).

data.title: Stablecoin Payment Volume Hits $4.5 Trillion in Q1 2026, Driven by Asian Markets
data.description: Stablecoin payment volume reached $4.5 trillion in the first quarter of 2026, according to a16z crypto's quarterly tracker. According to NS3.AI, nearly two-thirds of this volume originated from Asia, with significant contributions from Singapore, Hong Kong, and Japan. An IMF working paper has linked the U.S. House passage of the GENIUS Act to an approximate $22 billion abnormal drop in market value across 35 payment companies, underscoring growing concerns about potential disruptions to traditional payment networks.

data.title: Ethereum Trader Achieves Top Position with Significant Gains
data.description: On April 30, a prominent Ethereum trader has reportedly achieved substantial profits through strategic trading activities. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the trader, known for previously accumulating long positions totaling 120,000 ETH, has seen significant gains over the past two months. The trader's two addresses have recently increased their holdings, now managing a position valued at $182 million, with an entry price of $2,265 per ETH. The current floating profit stands at $514,000, making it the top position on Hyperliquid ETH.

data.title: Polymarket TVL Reaches Record High of $537 Million
data.description: DefiLlama data reveals that Polymarket's total value locked (TVL) has surpassed $537 million, marking a new all-time high. According to Odaily, the platform's fee revenue over the past seven days has exceeded $8 million.
